The pirate (Robert Newton) and young Jim Hawkins (Kit Taylor) rescue Purity Pinker (Connie Gilchrist) and look for treasure.
programme.title: Long John Silver

programme.desc: Willie (Anne Baxter), a German woman, joins an American carnival passing through Munich. While traveling town to town, she joins Frank in his high-dive act, but tragedy is only a slip away.
programme.title: Carnival Story

programme.desc: Defeated in battle and angry at his wife (Sylvia Lopez), the B.C. ruler (Edmund Purdom) of Judea goes roaring mad.
programme.title: Herod the Great

programme.desc: A psychiatrist (Vincent Price) and a nurse (Lynn Bari) treat a veteran's (Frank Latimore) wife who has seen them kill the psychiatrist's wife.
programme.title: Shock

programme.desc: An unpopular captain (Gregory Peck) leads his cavalry troops to a mountain pass, to hold it against Apaches.
programme.title: Only the Valiant

programme.desc: A Scotland Yard inspector (Byron Palmer) follows an actress (Constance Smith) to her fellow lodger, Jack the Ripper (Jack Palance).
programme.title: Man in the Attic

programme.desc: A barmaid, a Bostonian and an Indian (Rita Gam) flirt with an artist (Scott Brady) in 18th-century upstate New York.
programme.title: Mohawk

programme.desc: Newlyweds (Lucille Ball, Desi Arnaz) splurge on a trailer for their honeymoon, which includes Yosemite National Park.
programme.title: The Long, Long Trailer

programme.desc: Irish sheep herders (Deborah Kerr, Robert Mitchum) roam with their son and helper (Peter Ustinov), making a living in the 1920s Australia.
programme.title: The Sundowners

programme.desc: Gorilla general Aldo (Claude Akins) hounds ape leader Caesar (Roddy McDowall) and what's left of humanity on simian-ruled future Earth.
programme.title: Battle for the Planet of the Apes

programme.desc: Corrupted by a lord (George Sanders), Oscar Wilde's London aristocrat (Hurd Hatfield) stays young, but his portrait begins to age.
programme.title: The Picture of Dorian Gray

programme.desc: Sitting in a wheelchair, his leg in a cast, a photographer (James Stewart) spies on courtyard neighbors and sees a murder.
programme.title: Rear Window

programme.desc: A dancing princess (Rita Hayworth) loves a Roman commander (Stewart Granger) and inspires King Herod (Charles Laughton) to have John the Baptist beheaded.
programme.title: Salome

programme.desc: The sled dog Buck helps a roughneck (Charlton Heston) and his partner to cover a lot of territory in Alaska.
programme.title: Call of the Wild

programme.desc: A hit man (Frank Sinatra) and company plan to shoot the president when he gets off his train in Suddenly, Calif.
programme.title: Suddenly

programme.desc: In a Nazi prison barracks, other POWs believe that a cynical American sergeant (William Holden) is an informer.
programme.title: Stalag 17

programme.desc: Dagwood (Arthur Lake) fights a cold and enters a songwriting contest with Blondie (Penny Singleton) after the couple accidentally gave more money to charity than they can afford.
programme.title: Leave It to Blondie

programme.desc: A spy and the FBI hunt a petty thief (Richard Widmark) who has lifted microfilm from a woman's (Jean Peters) purse.
programme.title: Pickup on South Street

programme.desc: Hopalong Cassidy stops Joe Weiler from instigating a prairie war between two ranchers.
programme.title: In Old Colorado

programme.desc: Moe, Larry and Curly Joe circle the globe with Phileas Fogg III and his girlfriend.
programme.title: The Three Stooges Go Around the World in a Daze

programme.desc: Gentle Dr. Jekyll (Spencer Tracy) tests a serum on himself, releasing vicious alter-ego Mr. Hyde on 19th-century London. Prowling the town, Hyde ventures to a music hall and encounters Ivy (Ingrid Bergman), whom he takes forcibly as his mistress.
programme.title: Dr. Jekyll and Mr. Hyde

programme.title: Gunfight at the O.K. Corral

programme.title: Breakthrough with Rod Parsley

programme.title: Good Morning LIVE
programme.desc: Good Morning LIVE is an engaging 30-minute program designed to inspire, inform, and connect viewers to the heart of meaningful living. Hosted by James Epperly, this dynamic show brings together a unique blend of inspirational devotions, thought-provoking interviews, and discussions on current events that matter most to you. Each episode offers uplifting messages to start your day on a positive note, insightful conversations with special guests, and a closer look at how current events align with faith and personal growth. Whether you're seeking encouragement, knowledge, or a deeper connection to today's world, Good Morning LIVE is your source for faith-filled and relevant content. Join us weekday mornings to experience a fresh perspective, inspired by truth and guided by hope.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Joyce Meyer, one of the world’s leading practicalBible teachers and New York Times bestselling author, shares encouragement andadvice to help people enjoy daily life.

programme.title: Gospel Truth with Andrew Wommack
programme.desc: Thirty-two years ago a man had an encounter with God that changed his life forever. Today, he shares that experience with thousands of people all over the world. The goal of Andrew Wommack is to reach as many people as possible with the love of God and message of grace and faith. He doesn’t measure the success of the ministry by the number of tapes distributed, books sold or offerings received. The real rewards, and proof that God is alive and working in people’s lives, are the many testimonies he receives from the people impacted by his teachings. To find out more, please visit our website at: http://www.awmi.net http://www.awmi.net/ www.awmi.net

programme.title: Rick Renner
programme.desc: Rick Renner is widely known for his interpretation of the Greek New Testament and his engaging teaching style. His teaching is punctuated by a unique ability to draw vividly descriptive word pictures from the Greek that illuminate the Scriptures in a fresh, new way. Rick also distinctively shares Bible principles through contemporary illustrations set against an extensive cultural and historical backdrop of New Testament times. In each episode of “Rick Renner,” Rick teaches in-depth on a passage of Scripture verse by verse, centered around a specific theme that is vitally relevant to the lives of believers who are hungry to dig deeper into the treasures of God’s Word. For more information, visit http://www.renner.org.

programme.title: The Elena & Natalia Show
programme.desc: We're twins, Elena & Natalia Maranian, and are passionate about sharing the love of Jesus through media. Together, we host and produce our talk show, The Elena & Natalia Show in which we have conversations about Jesus, life, and love centered on the beauty and truth of God’s Word. We are also honored to serve at our family's TV network and media ministry, International Christian Family Network, Inc. where we hosted our former talk show, New Generation.

programme.title: The Winners Way with Mac Hammond

programme.title: Jentezen Franklin

programme.title: The Counter Culture Mom Show
programme.desc: Former Hollywood actress, pop culture expert, Tina Griffin, left her Wisconsin dairy farm at the age of 20 and headed to Hollywood, CA to earn a BA in Film and Television broadcasting from California State University - Los Angeles. She’s traveled globally for the past 20 years delivering her eye-opening show, Hollywood Exposed https://counterculturemom.com/adult-session/ , explaining the real agenda behind the entertainment industry and its impact on the foundational development of today’s youth. Besides being in countless movies, Tina has worked on TV shows such as Jimmy Kimmel Live!, Young and the Restless, Days of Our Lives, Lizzie McGuire, Drake and Josh, and Malcolm in the Middle, competed in the Miss America pageant and worked at the OSCARS. She was involved with the Film Society as well as Women in Film and an active member of the Screen Actors Guild (SAG) and the American Federation of Television and Radio Artists (AFTRA). She has opened for bands such as Colton Dixon, Third Day, and Jeremy Camp. programme.title: Great Awakening With Rodney Howard-Brown
programme.desc: Dr. Rodney Howard-Browne is the founder and pastor of Revival Ministries International in Tampa, Florida. In 1983, he pioneered a church in the Northeastern Cape and pastored there for two years. After that, Rodney taught classes in a leading Bible School for another two years. Rodney and his wife Adonica pastor a church in Tampa, Florida, The River at Tampa Bay, which they founded in 1996 and which now has 3000 members. These three things have remained constant since the church’s inception…dynamic praise and worship, anointed preaching and teaching of the Word, and powerful demonstrations of the Holy Spirit and power.

programme.title: Coffee With Kim
programme.desc: COFFEE - Conversations of Friends of Faith to Encourage and Equip﻿﻿﻿ Do you know what happens when a few imperfect people gather around a table for real conversation? They discover they have the same questions about life...believe the same lies...and hide the same longings. They also discover that though they don't have all the answers, together they have so many more…and their wisdom is worth sharing. So come to our table for "COFFEE with Kim." Join us for conversations that are real…relevant…and right on time!
